business.name: Accent Home Improvements and Repairs
business.tagline: When it needs fixing, we fix it right

hero.headline: The fix-anything crew *Virginia Beach* trusts
hero.subheadline: From ceiling fans to siding repairs — Mike and his team handle what breaks, what's worn out, and what you've been putting off.

services_section.label: WHAT WE FIX
services_section.heading: The repairs that matter to you
services_section.subheading: Every job gets the same attention — whether it's replacing a door or fixing drywall damage.

services.title: Siding Replacement & Repair
services.description: Vinyl siding that's cracked, warped, or just worn out. We match existing materials and make it look like the damage never happened.

services.title: Interior Door Installation
services.description: New doors that actually fit the frame, hang straight, and close properly. No gaps, no sticking, no compromises.

services.title: Ceiling Fan Service
services.description: Remove old wobbling fans, install new ones, or fix the ones you have. Clean wiring, solid mounting, quiet operation.

services.title: Drywall & Sheetrock Repair
services.description: Holes, cracks, water damage — we patch it, sand it smooth, and match your existing texture and paint.

services.title: General Home Repairs
services.description: The fixes that pile up on your weekend list. Loose trim, squeaky hinges, cabinet adjustments — consider it handled.

about.heading: Mike Green and the Accent team
about.body: We're the handyman crew Virginia Beach calls when they want it done right the first time. Mike leads every job personally, and we've built our reputation one satisfied customer at a time. No surprise costs, no corner-cutting — just solid work that lasts.

reviews.name: LC B.
reviews.text: Vance gave me a very reasonable estimate for vinyl siding replacement and kept me informed throughout the entire process.

reviews.name: Debby W.
reviews.text: Mike responded quickly and worked within my timeline. He and Jason replaced 2 ceiling fans with quality, affordable work.

reviews.name: Michelle T.
reviews.text: Quick quote, fast scheduling, and fantastic door replacement work. Mike made sure everything was perfect before leaving.

reviews.name: NoBigDeal .
reviews.text: Michael quoted a fair price for sheetrock repair and even fixed additional issues at no extra cost. Quality work throughout.

service_areas.label: SERVICE AREA
service_areas.heading: Where we work
service_areas.subheading: Serving Virginia Beach and the surrounding Hampton Roads communities

cta.heading: Ready to get it fixed?
cta.body: Call Mike for a free estimate. No obligation, no pressure — just an honest assessment of what needs doing and what it'll cost.
